description: 用故事讲道理的小故事。
examples_json: [{"en":"Aesop's fables teach important life lessons.","zh":"伊索寓言教给我们重要的人生道理。"}]
[{"en":"The moral of the story is to be honest.","zh":"这个故事的寓意是做人要诚实。"}]
[{"en":"The tortoise won the race through persistence.","zh":"乌龟通过坚持赢得了比赛。"}]
[{"en":"The hare was overconfident and lost the race.","zh":"野兔过于自信输掉了比赛。"}]
[{"en":"The greedy dog lost everything.","zh":"贪婪的狗失去了一切。"}]
[{"en":"Patience is a virtue.","zh":"耐心是一种美德。"}]

description: 从经验中学到的深刻理解。
examples_json: [{"en":"The old man shared his wisdom with the children.","zh":"老人与孩子们分享他的智慧。"}]
[{"en":"Don't try to deceive others.","zh":"不要试图欺骗别人。"}]
[{"en":"He pulled the seedlings to make them grow faster.","zh":"他拔秧苗想让它们长快点。"}]
[{"en":"Perseverance leads to success.","zh":"毅力通向成功。"}]

description: 自相矛盾的说法或行为。
examples_json: [{"en":"His story was full of contradictions.","zh":"他的故事充满了矛盾。"}]
[{"en":"He sold both spears and shields.","zh":"他既卖矛又卖盾。"}]
[{"en":"The shield could block any attack.","zh":"这个盾能挡住任何攻击。"}]
[{"en":"The frog thought the well was the whole world.","zh":"青蛙以为那口井就是整个世界。"}]
[{"en":"He made a mark on the boat.","zh":"他在船上做了一个记号。"}]
[{"en":"He pretended to like the music.","zh":"他假装喜欢这首曲子。"}]
[{"en":"The grasshopper played all summer.","zh":"蚱蜢整个夏天都在玩耍。"}]
[{"en":"The ants worked hard to store food.","zh":"蚂蚁努力储存食物。"}]
[{"en":"The shepherd boy cried wolf.","zh":"牧羊少年喊狼来了。"}]

description: 寓言中常出现的危险动物。
examples_json: [{"en":"A wolf appeared and ate the sheep.","zh":"一只狼出现吃掉了羊。"}]

description: 相信某人或某事是可靠的。
examples_json: [{"en":"Once you lose trust, it's hard to regain.","zh":"一旦失去信任就很难挽回。"}]
[{"en":"The clever crow dropped stones into the pitcher.","zh":"聪明的乌鸦往水罐里扔石子。"}]
[{"en":"The fox flattered the crow to get the cheese.","zh":"狐狸奉承乌鸦想得到奶酪。"}]
[{"en":"Every fable has a lesson to teach.","zh":"每个寓言都教给我们一个教训。"}]
[{"en":"He couldn't put down his smartphone.","zh":"他放不下智能手机。"}]
[{"en":"Social media addiction is common among teens.","zh":"社交媒体上瘾在青少年中很常见。"}]

description: 工作与生活、线上与线下的平衡。
examples_json: [{"en":"Finding balance is the key to happiness.","zh":"找到平衡是幸福的关键。"}]
[{"en":"Consumerism makes people want more and more.","zh":"消费主义让人们想要越来越多。"}]
[{"en":"Practice gratitude for what you have.","zh":"对你拥有的心怀感恩。"}]
[{"en":"Notifications are a constant distraction.","zh":"通知是持续的分心来源。"}]
[{"en":"Live with intention, not on autopilot.","zh":"有意识地生活，不要自动驾驶。"}]

description: 共同生活或互动的人群。
examples_json: [{"en":"Real community is more than online friends.","zh":"真正的社区不止是线上好友。"}]
[{"en":"The lion is the king of the jungle.","zh":"狮子是丛林之王。"}]
[{"en":"The fox is known for being cunning.","zh":"狐狸以狡猾著称。"}]
[{"en":"The little mouse helped the mighty lion.","zh":"小老鼠帮助了强大的狮子。"}]
[{"en":"The lion was grateful for the mouse's help.","zh":"狮子感激老鼠的帮助。"}]
[{"en":"The mouse made a promise to help the lion.","zh":"老鼠承诺会帮助狮子。"}]
[{"en":"A small act of kindness can make a big difference.","zh":"小小的善举可以产生很大影响。"}]
[{"en":"Pride comes before a fall.","zh":"骄兵必败。"}]
[{"en":"Stay humble no matter how successful you become.","zh":"无论多成功都要保持谦虚。"}]
